skills.name: fastapi-best-practices
skills.description: ofershap/fastapi-best-practices (single-author, standalone, free/local) - FastAPI anti-pattern GUARDS docs/LSP don't enforce: async correctness (don't block the event loop), Depends() over globals, Pydantic v2 (not v1), middleware/background-task structure, route splitting. OPTIONAL / borderline - check python.fastapi.md first and skip if it already covers these. Verify the slug at install.
